register.name: Name:
register.name_info: Maximum length is 30 characters. Your name will be visible to anyone. You can change your name at any time.
register.email_info: We will send a confirmation link to your email account.
register.password_info: We encrypt all passwords with bcrypt, one of the best password hashing algorithms available.
register.invite_code_info: You need an invite code from an existing user to register.

highscore.title: Highscore
highscore.friend_info: You can add friends by clicking on the + button. This will highlight them on the live and past matches overview.

live.title: Live Matches
live.no_live: There are currently no live matches.
live.all_friends_have_bets: All of your friends have made their bets!

login.title: Login
login.social_login_suffix: or use one of the social logins.

mybets.title: My Bets
mybets.no_bets_info: You should place bets for the upcoming matches!
mybets.edit_disabled: You can no longer edit your bet.
mybets.no_team_selected: You have chosen no team so far.

extra_bet.max_teams_warning: You are not allowed to select more than 1 team.
extra_bet.max_teams_warning_other: You are not allowed to select more than {{count}} teams.
extra_bet.score_info: For every correct team you will receive {{scoreFactor}} points.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name (3 to 30 characters)
settings.invite_info: Share your personal invite link with friends so they can register.
settings.social_profile_id_notice: We will not store any additional information except for your profile ID.
settings.google_login_prompt: You want to use your Google account for login?

intro.title: Intro
intro.welcome: Welcome to the Worldcup 2026 Betting Game!
intro.description: On this site, you can place bets for matches of the football Worldcup 2026. It's totally free and you cannot actually win anything except for fame and glory. This site was designed as a competition: Who is the better forecaster for football matches? Compete with your friends and random people!
intro.my_bets_description: Set the number of goals for the home and away team for the next matches. You cannot place bets for any match that has started already.
intro.live_matches_description: Look at currently running matches. You can see all bets other users have placed.
intro.highscore_description: See how many points you have and how good you are compared to your friends and other users.
intro.account_required: You need an account to see your own bets.

who_made_this.question: Who made this?
who_made_this.answer_before_link: This site was made by me, Hans, a
who_made_this.answer_2016: I made it for fun in my spare time for UEFA Euro 2016.
who_made_this.answer_2018: Six years ago, this site was refurbished and got some new features for the FIFA World Cup 2018.
who_made_this.answer_2020: For Euro 2020 in 2021, the code was put on a more modern base.
who_made_this.answer_2022: In 2022, not much changed for the FIFA World Cup 2022.
who_made_this.answer_contact: Feel free to contact me if you've got any questions or found a bug:

invite_friends.question: Can I invite my friends?
invite_friends.answer_before_link: You are free to invite your friends, colleagues and family to play here. If you feel proficient enough you can
invite_friends.answer_link_text: host this site on your own server (open-source on GitHub)

get_points.question: How do I score?
get_points.intro: You get points if you made a bet for a match and the match is over.
get_points.correct_bet_suffix: (4 points) for a correct bet OR
get_points.correct_diff_suffix: (3 points) for the correct goal difference OR
get_points.correct_winner_suffix: (2 points) for the correct winner OR
get_points.wrong_bet_suffix: (0 points) in any other case or if you did not make a bet
get_points.match_factor_before_badge: Any match may have an additional
get_points.match_factor_after_badge: The points you get for a match are multiplied by this factor.
get_points.example_one_intro: You made this bet: 4:3 in the match Germany - Denmark. You would get
get_points.example_two_intro: You made this bet: 2:2 in another match. You would get

rank.question: How is the rank calculated?
rank.intro_before_link: The rank on the highscore is not only based on the score,
rank.intro_with_cnt: but also on the number of stars someone received (the CNT column on the
rank.intro_after_link: ). To be more precise, the rank is based on the following statistics in that order:
rank.correct_bet_suffix: (number of times the exact result was bet)
rank.correct_diff_suffix: (number of times the correct goal difference was bet)
rank.correct_winner_suffix: (number of times the correct winner was bet)
rank.wrong_bet_suffix: (number of times a wrong bet was made)
rank.same_rank_prefix: Two players will only ever have the same rank if
rank.example_part_one: User A and B share the same rank because they have the same score and the same number of stars.
rank.example_part_two: Although user C has the same score as A and B, he has a lower rank
rank.example_part_three_prefix: because he has a lower number of
rank.example_part_four: Although user D has the same score as A, B and C
rank.example_part_five_middle: as C, he has a lower rank because he has a lower number of

penalty.question: Are goals from the penalty shoot-out included in the match result?
penalty.answer_text: Only goals made during the 90+30 minutes (two halves + overtime) period of the match will be used as the match result.

see_bets.question: Can I see bets of other users?
see_bets.answer_text: Yes, you can see bets of other users once a match has started or is finished. No, you can only see your own bets as long as the match has not yet started.

new_features.question: What are the new features?
new_features.heading: Highlights
new_features.item_early_bets: You can place bets for every match from the beginning (round of 16, quarter-finals, etc.)
new_features.item_missing_bets_notice: Notify users of matches without bets in the navbar
new_features.item_unseen_past_notice: Notify users of unseen past matches

legal.heading: Legal rules
legal.rule_offensive_name: You may not change your name to anything offensive.
legal.rule_game_master: The game master may exclude you from the game at any time.
legal.rule_no_recourse: Recourse to the courts is not permitted.

activate.title: Activate
activate.success_message: Your email address is now confirmed.
activate.error_message: The email address is already confirmed or the link is invalid.

password_recovery.title: Password Recovery
password_recovery.heading: Recovery
password_recovery.email_help: We'll send a link to your email address that allows you to change your password.

password_reset.title: Password Reset
password_reset.heading: Reset
password_reset.password_help: This will be your new password.

user.empty_state: There are no bets to show.
